ADMIN_REG_SUCCESS: Admin registration request has been submitted! Please wait for the Supreme Admin to approve the system.
USER_REG_SUCCESS: Registration successful! Please check your email to activate your account.
INVALID_CODE: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: The email address does not exist in the system.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: The password reset link has been sent to your email.
USER_NOT_FOUND: The user was not found in the system.
PASSWORD_SAME: The new password must not be the same as the old password!
CHANGE_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: Password changed successfully! Please use your new password for your next login.
CODE_REQUIRED: The verification code cannot be left blank.
TOKEN_REQUIRED: The confirmation token code cannot be left blank!
